name: Copyright Material Release / Usage License
description: A legal release form granting permission from a copyright owner to a user for the specific use of a copyrighted work.
content:
COPYRIGHT MATERIAL RELEASE / USAGE LICENSE

This Copyright Material Release and Usage License (the "Release") is granted by the Licensor, {{licensor_name}}, to the Licensee, {{licensee_name}}, under the terms and conditions outlined below.

1. THE PARTIES

Licensor (Copyright Owner): {{licensor_name}}, Address: {{licensor_address}}, Email: {{licensor_email}}

Licensee (User): {{licensee_name}}, Address: {{licensee_address}}, Email: {{licensee_email}}

2. DESCRIPTION OF COPYRIGHTED WORK

Description of Work: {{work_description}}

Source / URL (If applicable): {{work_source_link}}

3. SCOPE OF LICENSE

The Licensor hereby grants the Licensee permission to use the Work for the following purposes and within the specified parameters:

  • Permitted Use / Purpose: {{permitted_use}}
  • Permitted Media / Platforms: {{permitted_media}}
  • Duration of License: {{license_duration}}
  • Territory: {{license_territory}}
  • Exclusivity: {{#if (eq is_exclusive 'Yes')}}This license is EXCLUSIVE (Licensor may not grant these same rights to others).{{else}}This license is NON-EXCLUSIVE (Licensor retains the right to grant these rights to others).{{/if}}

4. TERMS AND CONDITIONS

  • Attribution: The Licensee {{#if (eq attribution_required 'Yes')}}MUST provide credit to the Licensor when using the Work. Credit format: {{attribution_format}}{{else}}is NOT required to provide credit/attribution when using the Work.{{/if}}
  • Alterations: The Licensee {{#if (eq alterations_allowed 'Yes')}}is permitted to make minor alterations (cropping, resizing, filtering) to the Work.{{else}}is STRICTLY PROHIBITED from altering, editing, or modifying the Work in any way.{{/if}}
  • This license does not permit the use of the Work for any unlawful, defamatory, or pornographic purposes.
    • {{#if additional_conditions}}
  • Additional Conditions: {{additional_conditions}}
    • {{/if}}

5. COMPENSATION

{{#if (eq is_compensated 'Yes')}}

In consideration for the rights granted herein, the Licensee has paid the Licensor a licensing fee of {{license_fee}}. This payment represents full and final compensation for the agreed usage.

{{else}}

This license is granted gratuitously; no financial compensation has been exchanged.

{{/if}}

By signing below, the Parties acknowledge they have read, understood, and agreed to the terms of this Release on {{formatDate agreement_date}}.

Licensor (Copyright Owner)
{{licensor_name}}

Signature: _________________________

Licensee (User)
{{licensee_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: work_description
fields.label: Description of Copyrighted Work
fields.placeholder: e.g., Photograph titled 'Sunset in NY', Article on AI

fields.name: permitted_use
fields.label: Permitted Purpose of Use
fields.placeholder: e.g., Commercial website hero image, Educational flyer

fields.name: permitted_media
fields.label: Permitted Media / Platforms
fields.placeholder: e.g., www.mycompany.com only, All Print Media

fields.name: attribution_format
fields.label: Format of Attribution (If Yes)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Photo by Jane Doe, © 2026 Jane Doe

fields.name: is_compensated
fields.label: Is a licensing fee being paid?
